1. Normalize text
Collapse whitespace and create a case-folded deduplication key.

2. Resolve duplicates and label conflicts

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 336px; height: 1px; padding-top: 849px; margin-left: 305px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: 'Comic Sans MS'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Hard leakage assertion
Normalized keys are pairwise disjoint across train, validation, and test after every reload.

div.div:
Task variants
The same leakage-controlled splits are used for binary and ternary settings.
